hero.sub: Applying operational excellence to optimise existing assets, reduce emissions, and enable the global energy transition — across oil, gas, and renewables.

services.label: What We Do
services.sub: From upstream exploration to renewable transition — JLH Global Energy delivers full-spectrum energy services across six core divisions, operating in over 40 countries.
services.oil_desc: Onshore and offshore exploration and production across four continents — from seismic survey to first barrel.
services.renewable_desc: Solar farms, wind energy, and hybrid systems engineered for the global transition to clean power.
services.rig_desc: Heavy fabrication, equipment integration, and full lifecycle management of offshore and onshore rigs.
services.plant_desc: Full EPC solutions for refineries, LNG plants, and petrochemical facilities — built for maximum uptime.
services.pipeline_desc: 15,000+ km of pipeline designed, constructed, and maintained across the world's most challenging terrains.
services.pm_desc: End-to-end consultancy and project leadership for complex energy ventures — on time, on budget.

operations.label: Global Presence
operations.body1: We focus on mature, late-life assets where we can responsibly optimise production, drive capital efficiency, and reduce emissions. Where possible, we repurpose infrastructure for renewable and decarbonisation projects before executing world-class decommissioning.
operations.point3: Safe, efficient decommissioning with high recycling rates

about.label: About JLH Global Energy
about.body1: At JLH Global Energy, we are a driving force behind the infrastructure that fuels nations, empowers industries, and supports communities across the globe. From upstream exploration to clean energy transition, we operate with precision, integrity, and a long-term view.
about.body2: Trusted by governments, national oil companies, and private enterprises across four continents — we combine deep technical expertise with global reach and local knowledge.

esg.label: Sustainability
esg.body: Our Board-approved ESG approach focuses on five pillars: health & safety, environment, people, communities, and business conduct. We embed TCFD-aligned climate reporting and link rewards to multi-year emissions reduction targets.

items.title: Annual General Meeting – Operations Update
items.excerpt: Key production and cash flow highlights ahead of the AGM; strategy focused on energy security and decarbonisation.

items.title: Full Year 2024 Operations Update & 2025 Guidance
items.excerpt: Investment scaled to maintain production, maximise cash flow and reduce future emissions and operating costs.

items.title: Heather Alpha Topsides Removal Completed
items.excerpt: Major decommissioning milestone achieved with >95% material recovery expected through recycling and repurposing.

investors.label: Investors
investors.body: Access the latest results, presentations, and our strategic report. Stay informed on production guidance, capital allocation, and our progress towards emissions reduction targets.

careers.label: Careers
careers.body: Join a team that thrives on problem-solving and continuous improvement. We offer competitive benefits, learning opportunities, and the chance to work on some of the world's most complex and impactful energy projects.

contact.label: Get In Touch
contact.name: Full Name
contact.success_sub: Our team will be in touch shortly.
contact.registered: Registered in England & Wales · Co. No. 01234567

footer.tagline: Independent energy company focused on delivering energy security and driving the global decarbonisation transition.
footer.company_no: Registered in England & Wales · Co. No. 01234567

rig.sub: We design, construct, and maintain offshore and onshore rigs for oil, gas, and renewable energy operations — engineered for strength, safety, and long-term reliability.
rig.about_body1: At JLH Global Energy, our offshore and onshore rigs are engineered to operate in some of the world's most challenging environments.
rig.about_body2: We provide end-to-end solutions — from design and heavy fabrication to logistics, crew support, and environmentally responsible decommissioning.
rig.expertise_sub: From heavy fabrication to end-of-life services, JLH Global Energy delivers full-spectrum rig solutions built to international standards.
rig.safety_body1: Our offshore engineering teams prioritize safety above all else. Every rig is equipped with advanced monitoring systems, automated safety shut-offs, and real-time condition tracking.
rig.safety_body2: By combining robust engineering with digital innovation, we ensure our rigs deliver maximum uptime, operational efficiency, and reduced environmental impact.
rig.cta_body: Whether you need a new offshore platform, rig upgrades, or full decommissioning services — JLH Global Energy has the expertise to deliver.
